comment: Implementation ready for review: added file-embed passive mount scroll/focus regression; targeted tests, build, and fixed-port CDP smoke passed.

page.summary: Added the BLP-6 file-embed mount-scroll regression for Live Preview ![[MOC]] with inlineEditFile enabled, preserving non-passive outliner reveal behavior and leaving the parent Android Mobile root cause unproved.

outOfScope: Android Mobile root cause remains with the parent BLP-5 RCA.
No native Android/WebView workaround was added.
